name: Latidio
tagline: Multi-store e-commerce platform for small rural producers
description: A SaaS e-commerce marketplace connecting small rural producers with digital sales channels. Each seller gets their own branded storefront with product catalog, inventory management with full audit trails, and multi-channel payments via MercadoPago and bank transfers. Includes automated transactional emails, AI-powered Instagram copywriting, and OTP authentication.
highlights: Multi-store marketplace with per-seller branded storefronts
MercadoPago payment integration with webhook-driven order processing
Inventory management with stock movements and audit trails
AI-powered Instagram copy generation via Groq/OpenAI
Automated transactional emails with React Email templates via Resend
OTP authentication with Auth.js v5 and role-based access control
